mission.title: openkruise: docs: add in-place workload vertical scaling proposal
mission.description:
### Describe what this PR does
Add a proposal for In-place Workload Vertical Scaling.

Fixes #1212

resolution.summary: ## Sonatype Lift is retiring Sonatype Lift will be retiring on Sep 12, 2023, with its analysis stopping on Aug 12, 2023. We understand that this news may come as a disappointment, and Sonatype is committed to helping you transition off it seamlessly. If you’d like to retain your data, please export your issues from the web console. We are extremely grateful and thank you for your support over the years. [📖 Read about the impacts and timeline](https://www.sonatype.com/lift-retirement)
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
